_doc: Input file for scripts/build-vex.js. Each entry becomes a CSAF 2.1 §3.2.3 VEX statement via b.vex.statement(...). The build script combines all entries into one CSAF document attached to the GHCR image as a cosign attestation (predicate type https://docs.oasis-open.org/csaf/csaf-vex/v2.1/) named `hermitstash-vX.Y.Z.vex.json`. Empty `statements` array = no VEX document emitted (script logs and skips).

_statementShape.cveId: CVE-YYYY-NNNN (or use `ids` for non-CVE identifiers, see CSAF §3.2.3.5)
_statementShape.status: one of: known_not_affected | affected | fixed | under_investigation
_statementShape.justification: required iff status='known_not_affected'. One of: component_not_present | vulnerable_code_not_present | vulnerable_code_not_in_execute_path | vulnerable_code_cannot_be_controlled_by_adversary | inline_mitigations_already_exist
_statementShape.references: [{ url, summary? }] — advisory links, patch URLs
_statementShape.productScope: 'all' (every released platform + container image at the release version) or an array of product IDs
